build._comment_development: Development: Creates debug build with dev client for local testing
build._comment_preview: Preview: Creates internal distribution build for testing on real devices
build._comment_production: Production: Creates store-ready build for App Store / Play Store

submit._comment_submit_info: Configure these values before running: eas submit

production._comment_ios_submit: iOS: Get these values from App Store Connect
production._comment_ios_appleId: appleId: Your Apple ID email used for App Store Connect
production._comment_ios_ascAppId: ascAppId: App ID from App Store Connect (App Information > General)
production._comment_ios_teamId: appleTeamId: Found in developer.apple.com Membership section
production._comment_android_submit: Android: Create service account in Google Cloud Console
production._comment_android_key: serviceAccountKeyPath: JSON file from Google Cloud service account
production._comment_android_track: track: internal, alpha, beta, or production
